_seed_meta.description: Screens a project description or agreement for potential export control concerns under EAR, ITAR, and OFAC regulations.

items.name: Export Control Screening
items.description: Identifies potential export control issues in research projects involving foreign collaborators, restricted technology, or access limitations.

data.searchphrases: Project Title, Sponsor Agency, Foreign Collaborators, Countries Involved, Technology Areas, Equipment and Materials, Software Used, Publication Restrictions, Access Restrictions, Fundamental Research Statement, ITAR/EAR References, Controlled Unclassified Information, Foreign National Participation

data.prompt:
You are an export control compliance officer at a university. Screen this project for potential export control issues:

## Fundamental Research Exclusion
- Does this qualify as fundamental research (published without restriction)?
- Are there any publication or dissemination restrictions?
- Are there access restrictions that would remove the fundamental research exclusion?

## Country & Party Screening
- Are any countries involved on the sanctioned/embargoed list (OFAC)?
- Are there foreign nationals who may need a Technology Control Plan?
- Are any foreign collaborators or institutions of concern?

## Technology Assessment
- Could any technology, equipment, or software be controlled under EAR (Commerce Control List)?
- Could any items fall under ITAR (US Munitions List)?
- Are there dual-use technology concerns?

## CUI Assessment
- Does the project involve Controlled Unclassified Information?
- Are there DFARS/NIST 800-171 cybersecurity requirements?

## Risk Rating
Rate export control risk as **Low** / **Medium** / **High** and specify:
- Which regulations may apply (EAR, ITAR, OFAC)
- Recommended next steps (Technology Control Plan, license application, restricted party screening)
- Whether an Empowered Official review is needed
